hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场；【FINANCE】明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息；【FINANCE】沃什在美联储内部寻求最新的顾问任命。

items.title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
items.summary: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.
items.title_zh: 为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场
items.summary_zh: Allspring Global Investments 正在将客户推向央行正在加息或通胀动态不同的国家。

items.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
items.summary: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
items.title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
items.summary_zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

items.title: Warsh reaches within the Fed for latest advisory appointments
items.summary: Warsh has added two more key advisors as he seeks to remake how the central bank approaches the economy and monetary policy.
items.title_zh: 沃什在美联储内部寻求最新的顾问任命
items.summary_zh: 沃什又增加了两名重要顾问，试图重塑央行处理经济和货币政策的方式。

items.title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
items.summary: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.
items.title_zh: 芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比表示通胀过高；威廉姆斯认为价格压力有所缓解
items.summary_zh: 在他的家乡接受 CNBC 现场采访时，古尔斯比拒绝猜测他认为利率的走向。

items.title: Bond ETF flows surge in hunt for yield: 'Market sniffing out something here,' says BlackRock exec
items.summary: Bond investors are abandoning aggregate benchmarks in favor of a broad mix of fixed-income investments to maximize yield with the stock market on edge.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德高管表示，债券 ETF 流量激增，寻求收益：“市场正在嗅出一些东西”
items.summary_zh: 债券投资者正在放弃总体基准，转而选择广泛的固定收益投资组合，以在股市紧张的情况下实现收益最大化。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Ripple CEO stays bullish on bitcoin but says Saylor's strategy has hurt crypto
items.summary: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse called Strategy's preferred-stock funding model "financial engineering" that distracted the market, pointing to STRC's slide to a record low as the evidence. He runs the company behind XRP, a bitcoin rival.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官仍然看好比特币，但表示Saylor的策略损害了加密货币
items.summary_zh: Ripple的Brad Garlinghouse称Strategy的优先股融资模式是“金融工程”，分散了市场的注意力，并指出STRC跌至历史新低就是证据。他经营着比特币竞争对手 XRP 背后的公司。

items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Chaotic Rush to Help Victims Delays Some Rescues
items.summary: A surge of people rushed into the devastated earthquake zone to offer help in northern Venezuela, slowing the advance of emergency responders. The death toll linked to twin quakes earlier in the week surpassed 1,400.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉实时更新：混乱的救援行动延误了部分救援
items.summary_zh: 大批民众涌入委内瑞拉北部地震灾区提供帮助，减缓了应急人员的前进速度。本周早些时候发生的两次地震造成的死亡人数超过 1,400 人。

items.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
items.summary: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.
items.title_zh: 为什么黄金和白银的抛售拖累比特币下跌
items.summary_zh: 长期以来，比特币一直与贵金属混为一谈，以对冲美元疲软的风险。由于美联储态度强硬，该交易正在平仓，而比特币则与它本应与之竞争的金属一起下跌。

items.title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
items.summary: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.
items.title_zh: Tether 将 230 亿美元的黄金库存用于黄金支持贷款
items.summary_zh: 这家稳定币发行人正在扩展其代币化黄金策略，允许 XAUT 持有者以黄金为抵押进行借贷，这与比特币支持的贷款无需出售基础资产类似。

items.title: Polymarket hack updated to $3.1 million days after the platform promised users full refunds
items.summary: The prediction markets giant is under investigation in connection with false or deceptive marketing practices, according to news reports.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 向用户承诺全额退款几天后黑客攻击金额更新为 310 万美元
items.summary_zh: 据新闻报道，这家预测市场巨头正在因虚假或欺骗性营销行为而接受调查。

items.title: Strategy's valuation has fallen below the value of its bitcoin holdings
items.summary: For years, investors had valued the firm well above its bitcoin holdings, giving Strategy massive flexibility to raise capital as needed — a situation Michael Saylor and team took full advantage of.
items.title_zh: Strategy的估值已跌破其持有的比特币价值
items.summary_zh: 多年来，投资者对该公司的估值远高于其持有的比特币，这为 Strategy 提供了根据需要筹集资金的巨大灵活性 - Michael Saylor 和团队充分利用了这种情况。

items.title: Average IBIT investor now down about 40% as spot bitcoin ETFs cap second-worst week on record
items.summary: Friday's $444.51 million net outflow capped a seventh straight negative week, the longest weekly run on record for the category.
items.title_zh: 由于现货比特币 ETF 创下有记录以来第二糟糕的一周，IBIT 投资者平均下跌约 40%
items.summary_zh: 周五 4.4451 亿美元的净流出结束了连续第七周的负值，这是该类别有记录以来最长的周连续负值。

items.title: Strategy loses its bitcoin premium as enterprise mNAV dips below 1
items.summary: Strategy's STRC briefly fell to a record low of $71.40 on Friday, leaving the preferred shares about 25% below par.
items.title_zh: 随着企业 mNAV 跌破 1，该策略失去了比特币溢价
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 周五一度跌至 71.40 美元的历史低点，导致优先股较面值低约 25%。

items.title: DraftKings launches its own prediction markets exchange as consumer volume exceeds $3 billion
items.summary: The company said its prediction markets vertical has generated approximately $3.4 billion in annualized consumer volume.
items.title_zh: 消费者规模超过 30 亿美元，DraftKings 推出自己的预测市场交易所
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，其预测垂直市场已产生约 34 亿美元的年消费量。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将快速加入纳斯达克 100 指数，这将推动巨大的 ETF 购买需求
items.summary_zh: 如此迅速地加入 SpaceX 将使埃隆·马斯克公司成为纳斯达克最近采用的快速纳入框架的首批受益者之一。

items.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
items.summary: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.
items.title_zh: 国际救援队抵达委内瑞拉地震已造成 920 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 数百人仍担心被困在废墟下，家人迫切需要消息。

items.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
items.summary: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.
items.title_zh: 真主党谴责新协议，以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩和以色列签署框架协议一天后，官方媒体称，袭击已造成至少一人死亡。

items.title: Mexican Officials Have Become Informants for the Trump Administration
items.summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum of Mexico has pushed back against U.S. investigations into Mexican politicians. Now some politicians want to cooperate.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥官员成为特朗普政府的线人
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·谢因鲍姆反对美国对墨西哥政界人士的调查。现在一些政客想要合作。

items.title: Australia Says It Will Toughen Its Social Media Ban for Children
items.summary: Saying tech companies were “not doing enough” to keep youths under 16 off their platforms, the government announced tougher fines and new powers for a regulator.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚表示将加强对儿童的社交媒体禁令
items.summary_zh: 政府称科技公司在阻止 16 岁以下青少年远离其平台方面“做得不够”，并宣布了更严厉的罚款，并赋予监管机构新的权力。

items.title: After New York Elections, Israelis Fear Further Rupture in U.S.-Israeli Relationship
items.summary: Criticism of Israel’s war in Gaza, anger over the Iran war and election results in New York all suggest Israel’s solid support from Washington may be on borrowed time.
items.title_zh: 纽约选举后，以色列人担心美以关系进一步破裂
items.summary_zh: 对以色列加沙战争的批评、对伊朗战争的愤怒以及纽约的选举结果都表明，华盛顿对以色列的坚定支持可能是时日无多了。

items.title: Central and Eastern Europe Are Feeling the Heat Now
items.summary: Much of Germany and Poland were under extreme heat warnings on Saturday as the weather phenomenon driving this week’s record-breaking temperatures moved east.
items.title_zh: 中欧和东欧现在感受到了炎热
items.summary_zh: 周六，德国和波兰的大部分地区都收到了极端高温警告，因为导致本周破纪录气温的天气现象向东移动。

items.title: SecondFi maps recovery path after $2.4 million Cardano wallet exploit, aims to return funds within two weeks
items.summary: An exploit drained about $2.4 million in ADA from 374 addresses over three days through a flaw in SecondFi's wallet-generation software.
items.title_zh: SecondFi 绘制了 240 万美元 Cardano 钱包漏洞后的恢复路径，目标是在两周内返还资金
items.summary_zh: 由于 SecondFi 钱包生成软件中的缺陷，三天内，漏洞从 374 个地址中消耗了约 240 万美元的 ADA。

items.title: Ripple CEO says Michael Saylor has hurt crypto market as Strategy’s STRC trades 25% below par
items.summary: "Financial engineering does not drive long-term value ... long-term value of any digital asset is going to be driven by utility," said Garlinghouse.
items.title_zh: Ripple 首席执行官表示，Strategy 的 STRC 交易价格低于标准值 25％，Michael Saylor 损害了加密货币市场
items.summary_zh: 加林豪斯表示：“金融工程不会驱动长期价值……任何数字资产的长期价值都将由效用驱动。”

items.title: Solana DAT stocks climb double digits as SOL jumps 9%
items.summary: Sol Strategies (STKE) climbed as much as 22% to a high of $1.20 on Friday, outpacing other crypto treasury stocks.
items.title_zh: Solana DAT 股票上涨两位数，SOL 上涨 9%
items.summary_zh: Sol Strategies (STKE) 周五上涨 22%，达到 1.20 美元的高点，超过其他加密货币库存股。

items.title: Spain says ‘no exceptions or extensions’ for Binance, other crypto firms ahead of MiCA deadline
items.summary: Industry leaders remain divided over MiCA, with some praising the framework while others warn it could limit customer access to liquidity.
items.title_zh: 西班牙表示，在 MiCA 截止日期之前，币安和其他加密货币公司“没有例外或延期”
items.summary_zh: 行业领导者对 MiCA 仍存在分歧，一些人称赞该框架，而另一些人则警告它可能会限制客户获得流动性。

items.title: Trending Crypto: XMAQUINA (DEUS)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #914.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：XMAQUINA (DEUS)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#914。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 214 位。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 20。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
items.summary: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 在美国交易所推出六周后年收入突破 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 世界杯交易及其美国候补名单的结束正在推动 Polymarket 预测市场平台的快速增长。

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade More Strikes, Testing Truce
items.summary: U.S. forces carried out more airstrikes on Iran, calling them a retaliation for an attack on an oil tanker. Iran’s military later said it had attacked American targets in Bahrain and Kuwait.
items.title_zh: 中东实时更新：美国和伊朗进行更多打击，测试休战
items.summary_zh: 美军对伊朗进行了更多空袭，称这是对油轮袭击事件的报复。伊朗军方后来表示，它袭击了美国在巴林和科威特的目标。

items.title: Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
items.summary: Tokenized stock trading fueled fresh momentum across the Solana ecosystem, while Aave founder hinted at token buybacks coming under new framework.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币稳定在 60,000 美元附近，Aave、Solana 生态系统代币引领加密货币反弹
items.summary_zh: 代币化股票交易为整个 Solana 生态系统注入了新的动力，而 Aave 创始人则暗示将在新框架下进行代币回购。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
items.title_zh: 混合模型可以更好地预测哪些标记？

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
items.title_zh: 我们有本地模型免费对 OpenClaw 存储库进行分类！*

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: CFTC is conducting an investigation into Polymarket, source says
items.summary: The probe comes after the Commodity Futures Trading Commission and the Department of Justice dropped previous inquiries into Polymarket last July.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，CFTC 正在对 Polymarket 进行调查
items.summary_zh: 此次调查是在商品期货交易委员会和司法部去年 7 月撤销之前对 Polymarket 的调查之后进行的。

items.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
items.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.
items.title_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 正在推迟 IPO。这是卡尔什交易员认为会宣布的时间
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为 OpenAI IPO 将于明年初进行，2026 年发生的可能性只有三分之一，但很有可能在 2027 年 6 月完成。

items.title: Jeremy Grantham says, 'This is the most expensive market in American history'
items.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
items.title_zh: 杰里米格兰瑟姆说：“这是美国历史上最昂贵的市场”
items.summary_zh: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆 (Jeremy Grantham) 表示，围绕人工智能的估值飙升，使美国股市处于历史高位。

items.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
items.summary: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.
items.title_zh: “每个人获救都是一个奇迹”：委内瑞拉地震灾区的家人致电被困亲人
items.summary_zh: 家人在建筑物前守夜，担心亲人被困，但搬运沉重的废墟却是一项不可能完成的任务。

items.title: Heatwave breaks records in Germany, Denmark and Czech Republic
items.summary: An estimated 150 million people are now experiencing temperatures of over 35C across Europe.
items.title_zh: 德国、丹麦和捷克共和国的热浪打破了记录
items.summary_zh: 据估计，欧洲目前有 1.5 亿人正经历超过 35 摄氏度的气温。

items.title: Trump's face is added to select US passports for America's 250th birthday
items.summary: The commemorative special edition passports will be available on 6 July, and can only be applied for in person
items.title_zh: 美国250岁生日之际，美国护照上印有特朗普的头像
items.summary_zh: 纪念特别版护照将于7月6日发售，且只能亲自申请

items.title: Religion row as Texas makes Bible stories required reading in schools
items.summary: Critics say the new reading requirements infringe on religious freedoms and blur the separation of church and state.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州规定学校必须阅读圣经故事，引发宗教争议
items.summary_zh: 批评者称，新的阅读要求侵犯了宗教自由，并模糊了教会与国家的分离。

items.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
items.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.
items.title_zh: 货船遇袭后美国对伊朗实施打击
items.summary_zh: 伊朗指责美国违反了协议，并表示作为回应，伊朗袭击了与美军有关的目标。

items.title: Burkina Faso severs diplomatic ties with France
items.summary: The West African country's junta accused the former colonial power of undermining its national interests.
items.title_zh: 布基纳法索与法国断绝外交关系
items.summary_zh: 这个西非国家的军政府指责前殖民国家损害其国家利益。

items.title: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
items.summary: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.
items.title_zh: 梅洛尼和特朗普：事实证明，这是一个非常公开的分歧，很难修复
items.summary_zh: 意大利总理不久前还被称为“特朗普耳语者”，但他们的关系却从公开攻击变成了人身侮辱。

items.title: Billionaire Leon Black walks out of Epstein investigation hearing
items.summary: The House panel then issued subpoenas demanding the private equity tycoon, who co-founded Apollo Global Management, testify on camera and under oath.
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁莱昂·布莱克退出爱泼斯坦调查听证会
items.summary_zh: 众议院小组随后发出传票，要求这位阿波罗全球管理公司联合创始人的私募股权大亨在镜头前宣誓作证。

items.title: Volunteers Are Risking Their Lives to Stop Ebola. They Aren’t Always Welcome.
items.summary: Frontline Congolese workers who conduct safe burials are key to containing what experts fear could become the worst ever Ebola outbreak. They risk not just infection, but the anger of terrified communities.
items.title_zh: 志愿者冒着生命危险阻止埃博拉病毒。他们并不总是受欢迎。
items.summary_zh: 进行安全埋葬的前线刚果工作人员对于遏制专家担心的可能成为有史以来最严重的埃博拉疫情至关重要。他们不仅面临感染的风险，还面临恐惧社区的愤怒。

items.title: Once He Wanted to Lead FIFA. This Is Much Better.
items.summary: Jordan’s arrival at the World Cup is the culmination of decades of patient effort by one man, but also a moment of solidarity for his nation and its diaspora.
items.title_zh: 曾经他想领导国际足联。这好多了。
items.summary_zh: 乔丹登上世界杯是一个人数十年耐心努力的结晶，也是他的国家及其侨民团结一致的时刻。

items.title: Venezuela’s Economy Was On the Rise. Then the Earthquakes Struck.
items.summary: Expectations are now rising over the role the United States will play in helping Venezuela, which had already been laid low by decades of misrule.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉经济正在崛起。然后地震发生了。
items.summary_zh: 现在，人们对美国在帮助委内瑞拉方面发挥的作用的期望不断上升，委内瑞拉已经因数十年的暴政而陷入低谷。

items.title: Exiled Chefs From Myanmar Give Burmese Food Chance to Shine on International Stage
items.summary: Much of the world is unfamiliar with the cuisine, but an exodus from Myanmar after a coup has made it more visible on the international stage.
items.title_zh: 缅甸流亡厨师让缅甸美食有机会在国际舞台上大放异彩
items.summary_zh: 世界上很多人都不熟悉这种美食，但政变后大批人逃离缅甸，使其在国际舞台上更加引人注目。

items.title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
items.summary: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 最近的裁员说明了加密货币投资的现状
items.summary_zh: 尽管交易平台进行了重组，加密货币公司纷纷削减开支，预示着熊市即将到来，但 Altcoin Pro 的 Horst、Anderson 和 Zhuleku 解释说，没有理由恐慌。

items.title: Coinbase and OKX try to lure in Binance’s EU users after it failed to secure a MiCA license
items.summary: Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and Star Xu of OKX offered new users sign up bonuses of up to 8% of their deposits or transfers from other accounts.
items.title_zh: 在未能获得 MiCA 许可证后，Coinbase 和 OKX 试图吸引币安的欧盟用户
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 的 Brian Armstrong 和 OKX 的 Star Xu 向新用户提供高达存款或其他账户转账 8% 的奖金。

items.title: Binance founder CZ blames crypto's sour 2026 on mix of AI, global tension, 4-year cycle
items.summary: There is no single cause for the crypto market's 50% decline over the past year, the Binance founder told CoinDesk.
items.title_zh: 币安创始人 CZ 将加密货币 2026 年的糟糕表现归咎于人工智能、全球紧张局势和四年周期
items.summary_zh: 这位币安创始人告诉 CoinDesk，加密货币市场在过去一年下跌 50% 并不是单一原因造成的。

items.title: Dogecoin and Hyperliquid's HYPE led weekly crypto losses as AI stocks lure buyers
items.summary: A rotation out of chipmakers lifted much of the stock market, with the equal-weight S&P 500 at a record. Crypto was not part of it. Ether fell 8% on the week and the memecoins dropped harder.
items.title_zh: 由于人工智能股票吸引买家，Dogecoin 和 Hyperliquid 的炒作导致每周加密货币损失
items.summary_zh: 芯片制造商的轮换提振了大部分股市，同等权重的标准普尔 500 指数创历史新高。加密货币不属于其中。以太坊本周下跌 8%，memecoin 跌幅更大。

items.title: Base suffers second mainnet stall in two days
items.summary: Base block production resumed as of 16:11 UTC, following an alert to another mainnet chain stall at 15:33 UTC.
items.title_zh: Base 两天内第二次遭遇主网瘫痪
items.summary_zh: 继世界标准时间 15:33 收到另一个主网链停顿警报后，基础区块生产于世界标准时间 16:11 恢复。

items.title: Tokenization firm Securitize eyes early July NYSE debut with $400 million SPAC deal
items.summary: Seeking to debut next week, Securitize will receive roughly $400 million after retaining more than 70% of its SPAC trust.
items.title_zh: 代币化公司 Securitize 计划于 7 月初在纽约证券交易所首次亮相，完成 4 亿美元的 SPAC 交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求下周上市的 Securitize 在保留其 SPAC 信托超过 70% 的股权后，将获得约 4 亿美元的资金。

items.title: Bipartisan senators call for CFTC investigation into Polymarket after fake bets report
items.summary: Senators are demanding for the CFTC to investigate Polymarket following reports that it paid creators to stage fake winning bets.
items.title_zh: 两党参议员呼吁 CFTC 在虚假投注报告后对 Polymarket 进行调查
items.summary_zh: 参议员们要求 CFTC 调查 Polymarket，因为有报道称 Polymarket 向创作者支付虚假中奖赌注。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.title_zh: Codex-maxxing 适用于长时间运行的工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 Jason Liu 如何使用 Codex 保存上下文、管理复杂项目以及帮助工作在单一提示之外继续进行。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.title_zh: 三星电子为员工带来 ChatGPT 和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
items.title_zh: 使用 CUGA 构建真正的代理应用程序：轻量级工具上的两打工作示例

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨源存储 API

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.title_zh: 参加我们的 I/O 2026 测验，在 Google AI Studio 中进行编码。
items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的 9 个实际演示
items.summary_zh: 观看 9 个视频，展示 Google I/O 2026 上宣布的 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的功能。

items.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
items.title_zh: 查看 Futures Lab 中的真实 AI 原型。
items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。

items.title: MIT in the media: For the future of tech, "Massachusetts can absolutely lead"
items.summary: Leaders, faculty across MIT discuss fostering innovation and talent in Greater Boston in special series of articles published alongside the outlet's annual list of 'Tech Power Players'
items.title_zh: 麻省理工媒体：对于科技的未来，“马萨诸塞州绝对可以领先”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的领导者和教师在与该媒体年度“科技强者”名单一起发表的特别系列文章中讨论了如何在大波士顿地区培养创新和人才

items.title: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary: A new spatial memory system for robots efficiently captures details about the objects they see while exploring their environment.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以告诉你你把钥匙放在哪里了吗？
items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。
